description: Gauntlet hindsight defect registry — closed defects re-run by tools/qa-gauntlet/retest-defect.sh; S95 hygiene 2026-07-14 (residuals watched, not fake-closed)

defects.title: Air/sub multi-domain shooters must launch (not detection-only)
defects.fixSummary: Multi-agent blue assignment + PreferredHostileByShooter for concurrent domain engages

residuals.title: Expect recalibration drift
residuals.notes: Gauntlet oracle expects can drift after sim/policy changes; tier-tick expect regen must stay fail-closed and audited. Do not treat allPassed after silent expect rewrites as a free pass.

residuals.title: T5 discriminative weakness
residuals.notes: Tier-5 ladder scenarios remain weak at discriminating real regressions vs noise; catalog/red paths need continued hardening before T5 is a hard product gate.

residuals.title: GHA billing-gated CI
residuals.notes: Org GitHub Actions may be billing-gated; local oracle dry-run remains the proof when remote GHA cannot run. Workflow files are product gates only when Actions execute.

residuals.title: BalticReplayHarness CRITICAL (impact first)
residuals.notes: Any C#/harness touch affecting BalticReplayHarness is CRITICAL blast radius: GitNexus impact first, suite floor ≥1638/0f (or current floor), no DelegationBridge hotpath edits.

residuals.title: Dual-worktree land discipline
residuals.notes: Gauntlet source and product trees may not share a single worktree family; land via ordered cherry-pick / isolated worktrees per land plan — never wholesale merge of unrelated gau branch tips.
